jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Boat - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Boat! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Boat:
Boat is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boat!
